title: Burnout
subtitle: The Secret to Unlocking the Stress Cycle
author: Emily Nagoski and Amelia Nagoski
excerpt: Burnout is not a personal failure — it is a physiological state caused by incomplete stress cycles. Emily and Amelia Nagoski explain the science of the stress cycle, why women experience burnout at higher rates, and how to complete the cycle through movement, connection, creativity, and rest. The most practical book on burnout recovery.
